NEUVILLETTE_POWER_SOURCEWATER_DROPLET.de: Can hold up to 6. Some cards can consume [gold]Sourcewater Droplet[/gold] to produce additional effects.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_SURGE_POWER.title: Surge
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_SURGE_POWER.descriptio: At the end of combat, lose HP.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_ORATRICE_POWER.title: Oratrice
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_ORATRICE_POWER.descrip: When [gold]Oratrice[/gold] reaches 100, clear it and obtain a [gold]Final Judgment[/gold].
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_TIDES_POWER.title: Tides
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_TIDES_POWER.descriptio: After you play an Equitable Judgment, [gold]Surge[/gold] 2.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_CONVERGING_TIDES_POWER: Whenever you play Equitable Judgment, draw cards.
Whenever you play Equitable Judgment, draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] card(s).
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_PUBLIC_OPINION_POWER.d: This turn, whenever another player plays an Attack/Skill, you gain/lose 5 [gold]Oratrice[/gold].
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_WATER_TASTING_POWER.de: At the end of combat, gain Max HP.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_WATER_TASTING_POWER.sm: At the end of combat, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] Max HP.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_NO_RETRIAL_POWER.title: No Retrial
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_NO_RETRIAL_POWER.descr: When you lose HP, gain 1 stack of [gold]Buffer[/gold].
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_CONTEMPT_OF_COURT_POWE: After you gain [gold]Sourcewater Droplet[/gold], take damage. Lose 1 stack after triggered.
At the start of your next turn, [gold]Surge[/gold].
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_PLUIE_SUR_LA_VILLE_POW: At the start of your turn, lose 2 HP, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_SIN_UPON_SIN_POWER.des: When the applier gains [gold]Sourcewater Droplet[/gold], apply [gold]Contempt of Court[/gold] to the holder. Removed at the end of the applier's turn.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_ASSIST_ARREST_POWER.de: Whenever you heal, [gold]Summon[/gold] the same amount.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_SIPHON_PRIMORDIAL_SEA_: At the start of your turn, consume [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Sourcewater Droplet[/gold] to gain 2 [gold]Strength[/gold].
At the start of your turn, consume [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Sourcewater Droplet[/gold] to gain 2 [gold]Strength[/gold].
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_AGILITY_POWER.title: Agility
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_AGILITY_POWER.descript: Your next Skill card that gains [gold]Block[/gold] gains additional [gold]Block[/gold].
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_TEMPORARY_MAX_HP_POWER: In this combat, increase Max HP.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_LEVIATHAN_FORM_POWER.d: Your HP is [gold]infinite[/gold] for one round. After every 5 rounds, repeat this effect.
At the end of combat, obtain 1 relic, 1 potion, 20 Gold, and 3 Max HP. Remove this card from your deck.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_GOOD_MORNING_POWER.des: At the start of your turn, gain [gold]Melusine Sticker[/gold].
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_GOOD_MORNING_POWER.sma: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Melusine Sticker[/gold].
Every 9 [gold]Melusine Sticker[/gold] you play, gain 1 Sigewinne Sticker.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_COURT_SESSION_POWER.sm: The next [blue]{Amount}[/blue] card(s) you play will be [gold]Submitted[/gold].
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_WATER_TIGHT_POWER.desc: At the end of your turn, for each [gold]Sourcewater Droplet[/gold] you have, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_WATER_TIGHT_POWER.smar: At the end of your turn, for each [gold]Sourcewater Droplet[/gold] you have, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_LAMINAR_FLOW_POWER.sma: After playing your first Attack card each turn, consume [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Sourcewater Droplet[/gold] to play it once more.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_BREATH_POWER.title: Breath
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_BREATH_POWER.descripti: After you [gold]Surge[/gold], deal that much damage to all enemies.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_DEFENSE_POWER.title: Defense
At the end of combat, remove Traveling Spore and other cards from your deck.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_PAST_DRACONIC_GLORIES_: Your [blue]Equitable Judgment[/blue] deals double damage and causes you to lose additional HP when played.
Your [blue]Equitable Judgment[/blue] deals [blue]{DamageMultiplier}[/blue]x additional damage and causes you to lose [red]{AdditionalHpLoss}[/red] additional HP when played.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_BEAST_OF_STARS_POWER.d: After losing HP, heal [blue]{Amount}%[/blue] of the HP lost, then increase this effect by 10%.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_BEAST_OF_STARS_POWER.s: After losing HP, heal [blue]{Amount}%[/blue] of the HP lost, then increase this effect by 10%.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_DEVOUR_POWER.title: Devour
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_DEVOUR_POWER.descripti: After you play an Attack, the All-Devouring Narwhal devours 25% of the damage dealt to deal bonus damage to you this turn.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_DEVOUR_POWER.smartDesc: This turn, the All-Devouring Narwhal devours 25% of the damage dealt to deal [blue]{BonusDamage}[/blue] bonus damage to you.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_APPETITE_POWER.title: Appetite
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_APPETITE_POWER.descrip: At the start of your turn, afflict 3 random cards in your [gold]hand[/gold] with [gold]Craving[/gold].
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_PHANTOM_POWER.title: Phantom
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_PHANTOM_POWER.descript: After losing all [gold]Block[/gold], return from outside the whale's belly: exhaust all your Rift cards, shuffle cards exhausted due to Craving back into your draw pile, and heal to full.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_INSATIABLE_HUNGER_POWE: The All-Devouring Narwhal is about to devour the last card you played with [gold]Craving[/gold], leaving a [gold]Rift[/gold] in its place.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_HOSTILITY_POWER.title: Hostility
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_HOSTILITY_POWER.descri: After the All-Devouring Narwhal's HP drops below a certain value, swallow you into its belly.
NEUVILLETTE_POWER_HOSTILITY_POWER.smartD: After the All-Devouring Narwhal's HP drops below [blue]{Threshold}[/blue], swallow you into its belly.
